<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR adds direct indexing into ParamDicts and cleans up the repo slightly.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- Supports direct indexing of ParamDicts:  `param = td["parameter"]`. This eliminates the need for name maps and will allow simplified constructors. It also makes it much easier to extract single parameters.
- Remove the `.dev` folder and add a formatting file, update formatting GHA
- Remove `test/Project.toml`

New constructor pattern using CloudMicrophysics H2SO4SolutionParameters:

```julia
function H2SO4SolutionParameters(td::CP.ParamDict{FT}) where {FT}
    return H2SO4SolutionParameters{FT}(
        T_max = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_T_max"],
        T_min = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_T_min"],
        w_2   = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_w_2"],
        c1    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c1"],
        c2    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c2"],
        c3    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c3"],
        c4    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c4"],
        c5    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c5"],
        c6    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c6"],
        c7    = td["p_over_sulphuric_acid_solution_c7"],
    )
end
```

title: Support direct indexing for ParamDict
